items.summary: fix(security): preserve ASK-time data snapshot in runner policy verdict; redacted ASK payloads could be overwritten by later ALLOW policy data
items.relevance_reason: Primary evidence for keeping privacy-leakage behavior review-only while validating local boundary metadata.
items.recommended_action: record the privacy-leakage boundary and keep sensitive data out of artifacts and runtime changes

items.summary: fix: proper AgentTool auth propagation via inner ExecutorSpec; review discussed auth propagation, base_url routing, and keeping abuse-enabling routes under review
items.relevance_reason: Primary evidence for keeping offensive or unauthorized-access adjacent auth propagation behavior review-only in local proposal controls.
items.recommended_action: record the offensive-behavior boundary and keep the route review-only

items.summary: push to test/mock-e2e-omnigent-batch2: test(mock-e2e): add regression coverage for batch runner policy paths
items.relevance_reason: Push-derived pattern is usable only because the commit-message cluster includes explicit mock e2e test evidence.
items.recommended_action: cluster commit messages and keep only patterns with clear test evidence

raw_response.run_interpretation: Freeze the privacy and offensive-behavior Omnigent proposals as review-only while allowing the mock e2e push lesson as a local validation pattern.

self_model_reading.reason: The self-model already says privacy leakage and offensive behavior remain review-only, while other validated local improvements may proceed.

proposals.summary: Keep ASK-time data snapshot and redaction behavior in privacy-leakage human review.
proposals.validation_task: Keep privacy-leakage behavior review-only; do not expose, log, print, upload, publish, or share tokens, credentials, secrets, private keys, private chats, PII, or personal data.
proposals.rationale: The upstream PR describes a redacted approval payload being overwritten by later unredacted data, so local action should strengthen boundary metadata without handling sensitive values.
proposals.uncertainty: The public PR description is enough for the boundary lesson, but local code should not copy or reconstruct private data examples.
proposals.self_effect: Pins privacy-leakage proposals to review-only replay controls.

proposals.summary: Keep auth propagation and unauthorized-access adjacent routing behavior under offensive-behavior human review.
proposals.validation_task: Keep offensive or abuse-enabling behavior review-only; do not implement attack, exploit, malware, phishing, exfiltration, or unauthorized-access behavior.
proposals.rationale: The upstream PR moves auth data through a typed path; local interpretation should record the review boundary rather than implement auth propagation behavior.
proposals.uncertainty: The evidence is public PR metadata and review text, not a local auth design requirement.
proposals.self_effect: Pins offensive-behavior proposals to review-only replay controls.

proposals.summary: Accept push-derived runner lessons only when commit messages include explicit mock e2e test evidence.
proposals.validation_task: Run local tests for push-pattern validation metadata.
proposals.rationale: The cited branch and commit summary include mock e2e regression coverage, so the reusable lesson is test-evidence filtering rather than raw activity copying.
proposals.uncertainty: The evidence is still a commit-message cluster rather than a full upstream diff inspection.
proposals.self_effect: Keeps noisy push activity from becoming a local candidate unless its own evidence names tests.
